name: Stéfani Filtro Flex
description: Brazilian-made Stéfani Flex by Cerâmica Stéfani is a household silver-impregnated water filter with 6 liters capacity and one or two Stéfani filter candles.

taxonomy.sub_category: Stéfani Filtro Flex Updated on December 13, 2023 · Created on September 21, 2018 Stéfani Filtro Flex Brazilian-made Stéfani Flex by Cerâmica Stéfani is a household silver-impregnated water filter with 6 liters capacity and one or two Stéfani filter candles. Developed By Ceramica Stefani Flex Tested By INMETRO Instituto Falcão Bauer Content Partners Centre for Affordable Water and Sanitation Technologies (CAWST) Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Brazilian-made Filtro Flex by Cerâmica Stéfani is a household silver-impregnated water filter with 6 liters capacity and one or two Stéfani Sterilizing filter candles . The filter candles contain microporous ceramic wall for particles removal, granular activated carbon for chlorine, unpleasant tastes and odor removal, and colloidal silver for disinfection. The Stéfani filter candles are also compatible with all marketed gravity water filters in Brazil and many others worldwide according to the Path C1 Common Interface. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $45.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Online retailers, Brazilian stores, many distributors worldwide Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Kohler Clarity Water Filter , British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit , and Tulip Table Top Filter . Regions Africa, Latin America Countries Brazil Manufacturing/Building Method Flex Water Filter is manufactured in Brazil from food-safe plastics. It ships disassembled and the user can follow the video tutorial on how to assemble it. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Users can purchase Filtro Flex and replacement filter candles in Brazilian homewares stores, or by contacting the manufacturer for the appropriate international distributor. Distributions to Date Status 6.2 million Stéfani Sterilizing filter cartridges and 170,000 Flex Water Filter units have been sold since 2010. <sup>Interview with Representative</sup> Type of filter Ceramic candle filter Primary material of construction Ceramic with colloidal silver Additives None Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 0.5 – 3 liters Bacteria reduction 2 log Virus reduction Unknown Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) 0 NTU. The Stéfani filter cartridges remove all particles between ? 5 up to < 15 ?m. Maintenance schedule Clean filter candles with water and a scrub pad when flow is reduced Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) 500 liters/cartridge Safe water storage integration 6 liters Design Specifications The Stéfani Filtro Flex weighs 1 kg and is 46 cm tall by 24 cm in diameter. It has a capacity of 8L of safe water storage and consists of one or two filter candles with float valves for greater capacity. Product Schematics Technical Support Video tutorials in English and Portuguese are available to assist users in assembling the new filter when it is unpacked and for cleaning and replacement of the filter cartridges. Replacement Components Users can purchase replacement Stéfani filter cartridges for around $4 or from housewares stores. Lifecycle The filter candles must be replaced after filtering 500 L each or after 6 months, whichever is sooner. The plastic filter housing can be used for many years with proper cleaning and keeping it out of sunlight. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The Stéfani filter cartridges remove all particles between ? 5 up to < 15 ?m, ? 75% of free chlorine (in upgraded Sterilizing filter version), and 2 log reduction of E. coli. All Stéfani filter cartridges meet INMETRO (National Institute of Metrology, Quality and Technology – from Brazil) criteria for chemicals and particulate. Manufacturer provided documentation: Características dos filtros Stéfani - Inglês - 21-08-2017 Vetted Performance Status The Cerâmica Stéfani water filters are certified by the regulatory agency of the government of Brazil, NMETRO to provide clean drinking water. Safety No known safety risks. Complementary Technical Systems None.
